title: TNT Regeneration
description: Automatically regenerates blocks destroyed by any type of explosion (TNT, Creepers, Ghasts, Withers, etc.) with configurable delays and smart detection.
body:
# TNTRegen - Universal Explosion Block Regeneration

**⚠️ BETA WARNING: This plugin is in early beta and may not work properly on all servers. If this project reaches 100+ downloads, I will actively update and fix all reported bugs.**

A Paper plugin that automatically regenerates blocks destroyed by any type of explosion in Minecraft.

## Features

- **Universal Explosion Support** - Handles TNT, Creepers, Ghasts, Withers, End Crystals, Bed explosions, and more
- **Configurable Regeneration** - Set custom delays from instant to several minutes
- **Smart Block Detection** - Attempts to preserve player builds while regenerating terrain
- **Visual Effects** - Optional particles and sounds when blocks regenerate
- **World Management** - Enable/disable per world with blacklist support
- **Command System** - Admin commands with permission support

## Commands

- `/tntregen help` - Show available commands
- `/tntregen status` - View plugin statistics  
- `/tntregen reload` - Reload configuration
- `/tntregen toggle` - Enable/disable plugin

## Requirements

- Paper 1.21+ server
- Java 21+

**Note:** Please report any issues you encounter. Your feedback helps improve the plugin!
